violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Apple Cider was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Ice accumulation was observed at top of 2 door-reach in. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Unit cannot hold foods that require refrigeration for food safety. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Hot water not available at handwashing sink in cafeteria serving space. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
Knob on hot water at hand sink was observed broken and missing. Hot water knob shall be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Unidentifiable cleaning solution was observed in spray bottles not marked with the common name of chemical. Spray bottles shall be labeled with common name of chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
